name: Salad of Mache & Beets
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons Cranberry Juice Cocktail or water
6 Small Cooked Beets, Peeled and cut into thin sticks
9 Cups Mache (Lamb's Lettuce) or Boston Lettuce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together shallots, vinegar, cranberry juice or water, and mustard.
2. Slowly whisk in olive oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Pour half of the dressing into a separate bowl and set aside.
4. Marinate beets in the remaining dressing for at least 1 hour and up to 6 hours.
5. Just before serving, use a rubber spatula to press egg through a coarse strainer into a small bowl.
6. Toss the reserved dressing with the lettuce.
7. Arrange on 6 salad plates.
8. Divide the marinated beets over the lettuce and garnish with some of the strained egg and black pepper.
